<div class="js-cookie-consent cookie-consent"> <span class="cookie-consent__message"> {!! trans('global.cookie_consent_message') !!} </span> <button class="js-cookie-consent-agree cookie-consent-btn cookie-consent__agree"> {{ trans('global.cookie_consent_agree_btn_label') }} </button> <button class="js-cookie-consent-disagree cookie-consent-btn cookie-consent__disagree"> {{ trans('global.cookie_consent_disagree_btn_label') }} </button> </div>
